case_title: SAN FRANCISCO CITY EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION VS BROWN, LARRY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, LARRY
